subcodes.first_line: Know thou that thy brother hath attained unto the presence of the Countenance and was numbered among them that have triumphed. God hath, verily, ordained for him a glorious station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاعلم بان اخیک قد حضر تلقاء الوجه و کان من الفائزین و قد قدر الله له مقام عز
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort
